languages.text: "Нет, Вольный Торговец. Не в этот раз". {n}Его голос совершенно бесцветен, он старательно отводит взгляд от существа.{/n} "Я понимаю иррациональность данного решения, но муки этого конструкта всколыхнули во мне обрывки воспоминаний, которые я предпочел бы не бередить. Это все, что я могу сказать".

"No, Rogue Trader. Not this time." {n}His tone is utterly flat; he makes a deliberate effort to keep his eyes away from the beast.{/n} "I understand the irrationality of this decision, but the torment of this construct has stirred fragments of memories within me that I would prefer not to disturb. That is all I can say."
languages.original_text: "Нет, Вольный Торговец. Это все, что я могу сказать".

That is all I can say."

That is all I can say."

languages.text: «No, Comerciante. Esta vez no». {n}Su tono es totalmente plano y realiza un esfuerzo deliberado por apartar la mirada de la bestia.{/n} «Entiendo la irracionalidad de esta decisión, pero el tormento del constructo ha removido fragmentos de recuerdos en mi interior que prefiero no tocar. Eso es todo lo que puedo decir».
languages.original_text: "No, Rogue Trader. Not this time." {n}His tone is utterly flat; he makes a deliberate effort to keep his eyes away from the beast.{/n} "I understand the irrationality of this decision, but the torment of this construct has stirred fragments of memories within me that I would prefer not to disturb. That is all I can say."

traits.locale_text: «No, Comerciante. Esta vez no». {n}Su tono es totalmente plano y realiza un esfuerzo deliberado por apartar la mirada de la bestia.{/n} «Entiendo la irracionalidad de esta decisión, pero el tormento del constructo ha removido fragmentos de recuerdos en mi interior que prefiero no tocar. Eso es todo lo que puedo decir».

languages.text: “不，行商浪人。这次不行。”{n}他的语气没有一丝波澜，刻意避免去看那头野兽。{/n}“我明白这个决定并不理性，但这造物所承受的折磨，唤起了我记忆中某些我不愿触碰的碎片。我只能说这么多了。”
languages.original_text: "No, Rogue Trader. Not this time." {n}His tone is utterly flat; he makes a deliberate effort to keep his eyes away from the beast.{/n} "I understand the irrationality of this decision, but the torment of this construct has stirred fragments of memories within me that I would prefer not to disturb. That is all I can say."

traits.locale_text: “不，行商浪人。这次不行。”{n}他的语气没有一丝波澜，刻意避免去看那头野兽。{/n}“我明白这个决定并不理性，但这造物所承受的折磨，唤起了我记忆中某些我不愿触碰的碎片。我只能说这么多了。”

languages.text: Nein, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Diesmal nicht." {n}Seine Stimme ist schwach als er versucht, seinen Blick von der Bestie abzuwenden.{/n} "Ich verstehe die Irrationalität dieser Entscheidung, aber die Qualen dieses Konstruktes haben Erinnerungsfragmente in mir geweckt, die ich lieber nicht stören möchte. Mehr kann ich dazu nicht sagen."
languages.original_text: "No, Rogue Trader. Not this time." {n}His tone is utterly flat; he makes a deliberate effort to keep his eyes away from the beast.{/n} "I understand the irrationality of this decision, but the torment of this construct has stirred fragments of memories within me that I would prefer not to disturb. That is all I can say."

traits.locale_text: Nein, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Diesmal nicht." {n}Seine Stimme ist schwach als er versucht, seinen Blick von der Bestie abzuwenden.{/n} "Ich verstehe die Irrationalität dieser Entscheidung, aber die Qualen dieses Konstruktes haben Erinnerungsfragmente in mir geweckt, die ich lieber nicht stören möchte. Mehr kann ich dazu nicht sagen."

languages.text: « Non, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Pas cette fois. » {n}Il s'exprime d'une voix atone, faisant un effort délibéré pour détourner le regard de la bête.{/n} « J'ai conscience de l'irrationalité d'une telle décision, mais les tourments de cette machine ont ravivé en moi des bribes de souvenirs que je préférerais oublier. C'est tout ce que j'ai à dire. »
languages.original_text: "No, Rogue Trader. Not this time." {n}His tone is utterly flat; he makes a deliberate effort to keep his eyes away from the beast.{/n} "I understand the irrationality of this decision, but the torment of this construct has stirred fragments of memories within me that I would prefer not to disturb. That is all I can say."

traits.locale_text: « Non, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Pas cette fois. » {n}Il s'exprime d'une voix atone, faisant un effort délibéré pour détourner le regard de la bête.{/n} « J'ai conscience de l'irrationalité d'une telle décision, mais les tourments de cette machine ont ravivé en moi des bribes de souvenirs que je préférerais oublier. C'est tout ce que j'ai à dire. »

languages.text: "Hayır Hür Tacir. Bu kez değil." {n}Sesi bütünüyle düz çıkıyor. Gözlerini yaratıktan uzak tutmak için bilinçli bir çaba gösteriyor.{/n} "Bu kararın mantıksızlığını anlıyorum ancak bu yapının ızdırabı, içimde rahatsız etmemeyi tercih edeceğim bazı anı parçalarını harekete geçirdi. Başka bir şey söyleyemem."
languages.original_text: "No, Rogue Trader. Not this time." {n}His tone is utterly flat; he makes a deliberate effort to keep his eyes away from the beast.{/n} "I understand the irrationality of this decision, but the torment of this construct has stirred fragments of memories within me that I would prefer not to disturb. That is all I can say."

traits.locale_text: "Hayır Hür Tacir. Bu kez değil." {n}Sesi bütünüyle düz çıkıyor. Gözlerini yaratıktan uzak tutmak için bilinçli bir çaba gösteriyor.{/n} "Bu kararın mantıksızlığını anlıyorum ancak bu yapının ızdırabı, içimde rahatsız etmemeyi tercih edeceğim bazı anı parçalarını harekete geçirdi. Başka bir şey söyleyemem."

languages.text: 「いいえ、ローグトレーダー。今回は違います。」{n}彼の声は完全に平坦で、彼は意図的にその獣の目を避けている。{/n}「この決断の非合理性を理解しているが、この構築物の苦痛は、私が邪魔したくはない記憶の断片を私の中に呼び覚ましている。それが私が言えることすべてだ。」
languages.original_text: "No, Rogue Trader. Not this time." {n}His tone is utterly flat; he makes a deliberate effort to keep his eyes away from the beast.{/n} "I understand the irrationality of this decision, but the torment of this construct has stirred fragments of memories within me that I would prefer not to disturb. That is all I can say."
